hero.title: Oracle Ball AI — a personal AI oracle for daily clarity.
hero.subtitle: Ask by voice or text, receive a calm answer, read your daily horoscope, and keep your Daily Oracle widget on the Home Screen.

what.title: What Oracle Ball AI helps with

cards.title: Questions and decisions
cards.text: Ask about a situation, choice, mood, relationship, work, money, or personal direction.

cards.title: Daily horoscope
cards.text: Read a calm daily horoscope with energy, focus, advice, and one small action.

cards.title: Useful widgets
cards.text: Keep the Daily Oracle on your Home Screen and read useful guidance without opening the app.

cards.title: Reflection, not pressure
cards.text: Answers are designed to help you pause, reflect, and choose a calmer next step.

steps.title: Ask
steps.text: Type your question or use voice input. Voice is turned into text before the answer is generated.

steps.title: Personal context
steps.text: Oracle can use your optional astro profile, zodiac sign, selected answer style, and daily lunar context.

steps.title: Receive
steps.text: Get a structured answer with a short verdict, reflection, advice, and one small next step.

steps.title: Reflect
steps.text: Use the answer as a personal orientation, not as a guaranteed prediction.

daily.title: Daily Oracle and horoscope
daily.text: Start the day with a personalized daily reading: horoscope, mood, energy, focus, advice, small action, and question of the day.
labels: Same content in app and widget

mock.title: Today asks for a calmer pace.
mock.text: Choose one clear priority and let the rest become lighter.

widget.title: Read your Daily Oracle without opening the app
widget.text: Oracle Ball AI widgets are designed to show useful daily guidance directly on your Home Screen: a short horoscope, energy, focus, advice, and a link to the full reading.
preview: New users get 3 days of the full widget experience.
After that, free users keep a useful Lite widget.
Premium keeps the full Daily Oracle widget every day.
Premium is managed inside the app, not inside the widget.

small.title: Small
small.text: A quick daily sign and energy of the day.

medium.title: Medium
medium.text: A readable mini horoscope with energy and details link.

large.title: Large
large.text: A fuller daily reading with horoscope, lunar context, advice, focus, and small action.

astro.title: Astro profile and lunar context
astro.text: Oracle can use your optional birth date to determine your zodiac sign and basic astrological profile. Daily guidance can also include the moon phase and lunar context of the day.
astro.note: Astro context is used as a reflection layer, not as a guaranteed prediction.

ask.title: Ask by voice or text
ask.text: Type a question or speak it out loud. Voice input turns speech into text before Oracle generates the answer.
examples: How should I handle this situation?
What should I focus on tomorrow?
What is the calm next step?
ask.mockAnswer: Pause before deciding. The practical next step is smaller than the whole problem.

responseFormat.title: Structured answers for calmer decisions
responseFormat.text: Oracle answers are organized so you can scan the result, reflect, and act without pressure.
responseFormat.note: Some answer modes may also include Heart says, Mind says, and an Orb verdict to separate emotional and practical perspectives.

styles.title: Tone and context stay separate
styles.text: Choose a style for the tone, and a topic for the context.
styles.moneySafety: Money questions receive reflection and risk-awareness prompts, not financial advice.

premium.title: Go deeper with Premium
premium.text: Premium unlocks deeper readings, richer Daily Oracle features, Premium themes, full history, and the full widget experience every day.
premium.note: Premium does not promise unlimited usage or guaranteed predictions.
features: Up to 100 AI answers per day, subject to fair use and backend limits
Advice, small action, and question of the day

trust.title: Designed for reflection, not guaranteed prediction
trust.text: Oracle Ball AI provides personal guidance for reflection and self-analysis. It does not replace medical, legal, financial, psychological, emergency, or other professional advice.
bullets: No medical, legal, financial, mental health, or emergency advice
Widgets do not contain purchase buttons

faq.a: Oracle Ball AI is a personal AI oracle for questions, daily horoscope-inspired guidance, self-reflection, and decision clarity.

faq.q: Does Oracle Ball AI predict the future?
faq.a: No. It offers guidance for reflection and personal orientation, not guaranteed predictions.
Yes. Voice input turns speech into text before the answer is generated.
Daily Oracle is a once-per-day reading with horoscope, mood, energy, focus, advice, small action, question of the day, and lunar context where available.

faq.q: Is the widget useful without Premium?
faq.a: Yes. Free Lite keeps useful daily guidance. Premium keeps the richer full widget every day.

faq.q: Can I buy Premium from the widget?
faq.a: No. Purchases happen only inside the app through Apple purchase flows.

hero.title: FAQ
hero.subtitle: Answers about Oracle Ball AI features, daily horoscope, widgets, Premium, privacy, AI processing, and safety.

items.q: What is Oracle Ball AI?
items.a: Oracle Ball AI is a personal AI oracle with astrological context for questions, daily horoscope, self-reflection, and decision clarity.

items.q: Does Oracle Ball AI predict the future?
items.a: No. It is not a guaranteed prediction tool and does not decide your fate.

items.q: Can I buy Premium from the widget?
items.a: No. Purchases happen only inside the app.

items.q: What is Oracle Ball AI?
items.a: Oracle Ball AI is a personal AI oracle with astrological context for questions, daily horoscope, self-reflection, and decision clarity.

items.q: Is Oracle Ball AI a fortune-telling app?
items.a: It uses oracle-style and horoscope-inspired language, but it is designed for reflection and self-analysis rather than guaranteed fortune telling.

items.q: Does Oracle Ball AI predict the future?
items.a: No. It offers personal orientation and calmer next steps, not exact future prediction.

items.q: Who is Oracle Ball AI for?
items.a: It is for people who want a calm daily prompt, a reflective answer, or a different angle on everyday questions.

items.q: Can I ask by voice?
items.a: Yes. Voice input turns speech into text before Oracle generates the answer.

items.q: Can I ask by text?
items.a: Yes. You can type a question directly.

items.q: What answer styles are available?
items.a: Styles may include Wise, Concise, Gentle, Classic, and Humorous.

items.q: What question topics can I choose?
items.a: Topics may include Love, Money, Career, Decision, Mood, Horoscope, and Other.

items.q: What is Heart says / Mind says?
items.a: It separates emotional and practical perspectives when that response format is available.

items.q: What is the Orb verdict?
items.a: It is a short oracle-style summary that frames the answer as a reflection prompt.

items.q: What is Daily Oracle?
items.a: Daily Oracle is a once-per-day reading with horoscope, mood, energy, focus, advice, small action, question of the day, and lunar context where available.

items.q: What is the daily horoscope?
items.a: It is horoscope-inspired guidance for the day, written for reflection and daily focus.

items.q: What is lunar context?
items.a: Lunar context may include the moon phase and a short reflection layer connected to the day.

items.q: What is astro profile?
items.a: It is optional basic astrological context such as zodiac sign and related derived context.

items.q: Do I need to enter my birth date?
items.a: No. Birth date is optional and the app can work without it.

items.q: Is this a natal chart?
items.a: No. We do not describe it as a natal chart unless birth time and birth place are collected.

items.q: Why does the daily advice change once per day?
items.a: Daily Oracle is designed as a stable daily reading so the app and widget can show the same guidance for the day.

items.q: What does the Home Screen widget show?
items.a: It can show a short horoscope, energy, focus, advice, lunar context, and a link to the full reading depending on widget size and access level.

items.q: Is the widget useful without Premium?
items.a: Yes. Free Lite keeps useful daily guidance after the preview.

items.q: What is the 3-day full widget preview?
items.a: New users get 3 days of the full widget experience without an automatic purchase.

items.q: What happens after 3 days?
items.a: Free users keep a useful Lite widget, while Premium keeps the full Daily Oracle widget every day.

items.q: What does Premium unlock in the widget?
items.a: Premium keeps the full daily horoscope, lunar context, advice, small action, question of the day, and richer large widget visible every day.

items.q: Can I buy Premium from the widget?
items.a: No. Purchases happen only inside the app.

items.q: What is included in Premium?
items.a: Premium includes deeper readings, up to 100 AI answers per day, no ads where applicable, Premium styles, full history, Daily Oracle Plus, full widget, lunar context, and Premium themes.

items.q: How many AI answers do Premium users get?
items.a: Premium currently supports up to 100 AI answers per day, subject to fair use, safety, service availability, and backend limits.

items.q: Does Premium remove ads?
items.a: Premium removes ads where applicable.

items.q: What are Deep Answer credits?
items.a: Credits are one-time packs for deep answers where supported by the app.

items.q: Do credits expire?
items.a: Credits do not expire where supported by the app, subject to app functionality and service availability.

items.q: How do I cancel Premium?
items.a: Cancel through iPhone Settings, Apple ID, Subscriptions.

items.q: How do I restore purchases?
items.a: Open the app and use Restore Purchases in Settings or Premium.

items.q: What data is collected?
items.a: Depending on features used, the app may process question text, optional birth date, derived zodiac context, selected tone, topic, Daily Oracle content, widget payload, purchase status, usage data, diagnostics, ads data where permitted, and support messages.

items.q: Is my question sent to AI providers?
items.a: For AI answers, question text may be sent through Mentivo backend to an AI provider to generate the requested response.

items.q: Is my birth date sent to AI?
items.a: The app should avoid sending exact birth date when not necessary and may use derived context such as zodiac sign, element, and selected tone.

items.q: Are questions used in analytics?
items.a: Full question text should not be used in analytics. Analytics may use aggregate feature events such as mode, language, answer type, and usage counts.

items.q: Can I delete my data?
items.a: Yes. You can delete local history and request backend/account deletion where applicable.

items.q: Can I use this for medical advice?
items.a: No. It is not a substitute for medical care.

items.q: Can I use this for legal advice?
items.a: No. It is not legal advice.

items.q: Can I use this for financial advice?
items.a: No. Money answers are reflection and risk-awareness prompts, not financial advice.

items.q: What should I do in an emergency?
items.a: Contact local emergency services or a qualified professional immediately.

hero.title: Status
hero.subtitle: Current status for Mentivo website, support, and Oracle Ball AI infrastructure.

status.note: This page is manually maintained unless a live monitoring integration is added.

privacy.description: Learn how Mentivo handles question text, optional birth date, Daily Oracle, widgets, AI processing, analytics, ads, purchases, and deletion requests.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: This Privacy Policy explains how Mentivo collects, uses, and protects information when you use our websites, mobile applications, AI features, Daily Oracle, widgets, analytics, ads, purchases, and support services.

sections.title: Data we collect
sections.text: Depending on the app and features you use, we may process app usage data, purchase or subscription status, premium entitlement status, device language, app settings, crash diagnostics, advertising identifiers where permitted, support messages, AI question text, selected Oracle style, selected question topic, saved answers/history, optional birth date, optional form of address or tone, zodiac sign, derived astro profile, Daily Oracle content, widget payload, and 3-day widget preview dates.

sections.title: AI processing
sections.text: For AI-powered features, question text may be sent from the app to our backend and then to an AI provider to generate an answer. When possible, we avoid sending unnecessary personal data to AI providers. For astrology-related personalization, the app may derive context such as zodiac sign, element, or selected tone before generating a response.

sections.title: Voice input and permissions
sections.text: If you use voice input, the app requests microphone and speech recognition permissions. Speech is converted to text before an Oracle answer is generated. We do not use microphone access for advertising, and we do not store raw microphone recordings on our servers.

sections.title: Biometric lock
sections.text: If you enable Face ID or device biometrics, authentication is handled by iOS on your device. Mentivo does not receive or store Face ID data or biometric templates.

sections.title: Home Screen Widgets
sections.text: Widget content may be stored locally or in shared app storage so the widget can display Daily Oracle content outside the app. The widget does not process purchases and does not call AI providers directly.

sections.title: Daily Oracle and astro context
sections.text: Daily Oracle may use derived context such as zodiac sign, selected style, language, moon phase, lunar context, and optional profile settings. Exact birth date should be avoided in AI requests when derived context is enough.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.text: Analytics events may include mode, language, question length, user type, answer type, app opens, purchases, ads, feature usage, and widget usage. Full question text should not be sent in analytics events.

sections.title: Advertising
sections.text: Free users may see ads from advertising partners such as Google AdMob. Advertising partners may process device identifiers, advertising identifiers, approximate location, ad interaction data, and tracking data where permitted by iOS settings, App Tracking Transparency consent, regional consent choices, and partner policies.

sections.title: Purchases
sections.text: In-app purchases and subscriptions are processed by Apple. We may receive transaction status and product identifiers needed to unlock Premium, credits, widget access, or restore purchases.

sections.title: Data deletion
sections.text: You can delete local history in the app and request backend/account deletion. See Delete Data for instructions.

sections.title: Contact
sections.text: For privacy questions or requests, contact {email}.

terms.description: Terms for Mentivo websites and Oracle Ball AI, including AI limitations, Daily Oracle, widgets, Premium, Lite, credits, safety boundaries, and Apple purchases.
terms.title: Terms of Use

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.text: By using Mentivo apps or websites, you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the services.

sections.title: Daily Oracle and astro features
sections.text: Daily Oracle, horoscope, astro profile, and lunar context features are intended for reflection and self-analysis. They do not guarantee future events.

sections.title: AI limitations
sections.text: AI answers may be incomplete, inaccurate, symbolic, or unsuitable for serious decisions. Oracle Ball AI does not promise guaranteed predictions.

sections.title: No professional advice
sections.text: Our apps do not provide medical, legal, financial, psychological, emergency, or other professional advice. For important matters, contact a qualified professional or emergency service.

sections.title: Widgets
sections.text: Widgets display Daily Oracle content and links to the app. Widgets do not include purchase buttons, advertising, or in-app purchase flows.

sections.title: 3-day full widget preview
sections.text: The 3-day full widget preview is a product preview unless explicitly shown as an App Store subscription trial in the purchase screen. It does not create a paid subscription by itself.

sections.title: Premium and Lite
sections.text: Free Lite includes limited AI usage, Daily Oracle Lite, useful Lite widgets, ads where applicable, limited history, and a 3-day full widget preview for new users. Premium unlocks deeper readings, full history, Daily Oracle Plus, full Daily Oracle widgets, Premium styles, Premium themes, and up to 100 AI answers per day subject to fair use and backend limits.

sections.title: Credits
sections.text: Purchased answer credits may be used for one-time Deep Answers where supported by the app. Premium users may not spend credits for features included in Premium.

sections.title: Apple purchases and refunds
sections.text: Subscriptions, in-app purchases, cancellation, renewal, restore, and refunds are governed by Apple App Store rules and the purchase screen shown before confirmation.

sections.title: Contact
sections.text: For questions about these terms, contact {email}.

deleteData.description: Learn how to delete Oracle Ball AI local question history, saved answers, Daily Oracle data, widget payload, birth date, astro profile, settings, and backend/account data.
deleteData.title: Delete Data

sections.title: Data you can delete
sections.text: Depending on the feature, deletable data may include local question history, saved answers, Daily Oracle local data, widget payload, birth date, astro profile, form of address, app settings, backend/account data where applicable, and support messages.

sections.title: Delete local history
sections.text: Open the app, go to Settings, choose delete history or related data controls, and confirm deletion.

sections.title: Delete backend/account data
sections.text: If backend/account data exists for your app version, use the in-app deletion flow or email {email} with the app name, request type, and user identifier shown in app settings if available.

sections.title: Important limits
sections.text: Deleting local history may not automatically delete data already processed by third-party AI providers or support email systems. Contact support for backend/account deletion requests.

sections.title: What we may keep
sections.text: Some records may be retained for legal, tax, purchase verification, fraud prevention, security, or dispute resolution where permitted by law.

refund.description: Refund and restore information for Oracle Ball AI subscriptions, Premium, credits, and the local 3-day full widget preview.
refund.title: Refund Policy

sections.title: Apple handles payments
sections.text: Mentivo does not directly process App Store payments and cannot directly issue App Store refunds. Purchases and subscriptions are handled by Apple.

sections.title: How to request a refund
sections.text: Use Apple Report a Problem or Apple billing support. Apple decides refund eligibility under Apple rules.

sections.title: Subscriptions
sections.text: You can cancel subscriptions in iPhone Settings, Apple ID, Subscriptions.

sections.title: 3-day full widget preview
sections.text: The local 3-day full widget preview is not a subscription trial unless the App Store purchase screen explicitly says a subscription trial is being started.

sections.title: Restore Premium and credits
sections.text: Open the app and tap Restore Purchases in Settings or Premium. Credits can be restored where supported by Apple purchase records and app functionality.

sections.title: Need help?
sections.text: Email {email} with the app name, issue description, purchase date if available, and a screenshot if helpful.

cookies.description: Cookie and local storage information for Mentivo websites and related app support pages.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: Mentivo websites may use essential technologies for site operation and may use analytics or advertising technologies if enabled.

sections.title: Essential cookies / local storage
sections.text: Essential technologies may support navigation, security, preferences, selected language, and basic site operation.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.text: If analytics are enabled, they help us understand aggregate website usage and improve content. We aim to avoid collecting unnecessary personal data.

sections.title: Advertising
sections.text: This website currently uses minimal technologies. Mentivo apps may use analytics and ads as described in the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Managing choices
sections.text: You can manage cookies and local storage in your browser settings. App-level tracking choices are managed in iOS settings where applicable.

sections.title: Contact
sections.text: For cookie questions, contact {email}.
